purpose: Top-level contract index for deterministic AI study-builder integrations.
sourceOfTruth: The app modules are authoritative. Generated JSON files are inspectable copies checked for drift.

contracts.role: Lists real studies, views, labels, summaries, and capabilities.
Maps simple user-language requests to draft StudyPlan objects without AI calls.
Validates proposed study routes and builds confirmation previews before execution.
Defines reusable validated StudyPlan recipes, persisted by backend settings endpoints with browser-local fallback.
Builds deterministic explanation seeds from durable study-run ledger records.
Combines explanation seed and replay StudyPlan into one assistant-safe handoff payload.
Converts a handoff into a deterministic permission envelope for future assistant prose.
Controls metric headline, diagnostic, suppressed, export, and policy-validation behavior.
Read-only feasibility proposal for new study ideas before code, data fetches, or conclusions.

requiredFlow: Use the intent planner only as a draft helper; never treat it as authority.
Validate the StudyPlan and metric proposals deterministically.
Execute only after explicit user confirmation.
Explain results only from durable run records, assistant handoffs, explanation seeds, and registry caveats.
Fetch completed-run handoffs through POST /api/assistant/study-run-brief when crossing the backend boundary.
Before generated result prose, build a study-run explanation brief from the handoff and obey its allowed actions.

errorStatuses.condition: the JS assistant contract manifest bridge is unavailable, invalid, or timed out

backendEndpoints.role: Backend-readable top-level contract index for deterministic assistant integrations.

errorStatuses.condition: the JS assistant contract bundle bridge is unavailable, invalid, or timed out

backendEndpoints.role: Backend-readable full deterministic contract bundle for in-app assistant consumers.

requestShape.artifactChecks: optional boolean-like query parameter; false skips generated-doc drift commands

errorStatuses.condition: a deterministic contract bridge or readiness command is unavailable, invalid, or timed out

backendEndpoints.role: Backend-readable assistant readiness summary; keyless deterministic preflight before live AI testing.

errorStatuses.condition: missing, non-integer, boolean, zero, or negative runId
no durable study run exists for the requested runId
the JS assistant contract bridge is unavailable, invalid, or timed out

backendEndpoints.role: Backend-owned durable ledger boundary for completed-run explanation and replay handoff.

errorStatuses.condition: request body is not a JSON object or intent is missing
the deterministic study-builder or readiness bridge is unavailable, invalid, or timed out

backendEndpoints.role: Backend-owned keyless dry run for future assistant planning: draft, validate, and report readiness without executing a study or calling an AI model.

requestShape.model: optional OpenAI model id; defaults to configured OPENAI_STUDY_PLANNER_MODEL, OPENAI_MODEL, or safe app default

errorStatuses.condition: request body is not a JSON object, intent is missing, or OPENAI_API_KEY is not configured
OpenAI request, JSON parsing, deterministic validation, or readiness bridge fails

backendEndpoints.role: Optional live OpenAI planner boundary: model drafts StudyPlan JSON, deterministic app validates it, and no study execution or result prose occurs.

errorStatuses.condition: request body is not a JSON object
the JS study-builder contract bridge is unavailable, invalid, or timed out

backendEndpoints.role: Backend-owned deterministic intent-to-StudyPlan draft boundary; no AI call is made.

requestShape.approvedTools: optional array of approved tool descriptors

errorStatuses.condition: request body is not a JSON object or idea is missing
the JS study proposal bridge is unavailable, invalid, or timed out

backendEndpoints.role: Backend-owned read-only proposal boundary for evaluating whether a new study idea is testable.

requestShape.plan: study-plan-v1 object, or routeHash for route conversion

errorStatuses.condition: request body is not a JSON object
the JS study-builder contract bridge is unavailable, invalid, or timed out

backendEndpoints.role: Backend-owned deterministic StudyPlan validation and confirmation-preview boundary.

errorStatuses.condition: limit is not an integer

backendEndpoints.role: Backend-owned list of reusable validated StudyPlan recipes; not completed-run evidence.

errorStatuses.condition: request body is not a JSON object
the JS study-builder contract bridge or local recipe store is unavailable

backendEndpoints.role: Backend-owned save/update boundary for reusable validated StudyPlan recipes.

errorStatuses.condition: request body is not a JSON object or recipe id is missing

backendEndpoints.role: Backend-owned delete boundary for reusable StudyPlan recipes.

hardStops: Do not invent study IDs, view IDs, route params, or metric IDs.
Do not bypass the confirmation preview.
Do not headline or export a metric rejected by the metric registry.
Do not explain a study result without a durable study-run ledger record.
Do not rebuild replay parameters manually when a handoff replay StudyPlan is available.
Do not generate result conclusions when the explanation brief blocks them.
Do not treat generated JSON artifacts as editable source-of-truth files.
